description: Research Metformin Hydrochloride, Lisinopril, Atorvastatin Calcium, Omeprazole, and Sertraline Hydrochloride on NIH DailyMed (https://dailymed.nlm.nih.gov/). Download official drug label PDFs for at least two of these medications to ~/Downloads/. Organize the DailyMed pages for all five drugs into a bookmark folder named 'Medication Reference'. Document the research in a JSON file at ~/Documents/medication_reference.json using keys 'metformin', 'lisinopril', 'atorvastatin', 'omeprazole', and 'sertraline', including 'brand_name', 'drug_class', 'ndc', 'indication', 'boxed_warning' (boolean), and 'boxed_warning_summary' (string or null) for each entry.
